generatedBy: build_churn_subpatterns.mjs — keyword detection over customer_profiles + churn_inferences + Churn Details.xlsx
notes: Each customer can have multiple sub-pattern tags within their parent churn-reason cluster. Sub-patterns are not mutually exclusive.

fi_bandwidth_stalled.label: Bandwidth stalled
fi_bandwidth_stalled.description: Owner could not dedicate the time. Implementation paused indefinitely, never resumed.

fi_diy_attempt_failed.label: DIY attempt failed
fi_diy_attempt_failed.description: Customer chose self-build at signup, struggled, then refused to engage paid services.

fi_cs_responsiveness.label: Allmoxy CS dropped ball
fi_cs_responsiveness.description: CSM team failed to respond, lost the train, missed comms, or wrong stakeholder targeted by our side.

fi_sales_overpromise.label: Sales over-promise
fi_sales_overpromise.description: Customer believed they were buying features or integrations that did not really exist.

fi_third_party_services_quality.label: 3rd-party services quality
fi_third_party_services_quality.description: Catalog built by an affiliate / outsourced contractor who got it wrong or lacked expertise.

fi_wrong_stakeholder.label: Wrong stakeholder / owner not in loop
fi_wrong_stakeholder.description: Owner / decision-maker wasn’t involved; middle-manager started without authority, or multi-stakeholder confusion.

fi_no_catalog_definition.label: Catalog not yet defined
fi_no_catalog_definition.description: Customer didn’t have a defined SKU/product structure to map into Allmoxy; they wanted Allmoxy to figure it out for them.

fi_setup_cost_shock.label: Setup-cost sticker shock
fi_setup_cost_shock.description: Customer agreed to monthly subscription but flinched at the integration / build-out quote.

fi_feature_gap_blocked.label: Product feature gap blocked launch
fi_feature_gap_blocked.description: A real product limitation prevented the customer from launching, despite both sides trying.

fi_customer_team_turnover.label: Customer team turnover mid-impl
fi_customer_team_turnover.description: Key staff or management on the customer side left, halting progress.

fi_enduser_adoption_failure.label: End-user adoption failure
fi_enduser_adoption_failure.description: Allmoxy was built and live, but the customer’s own customers (dealers, end-users) wouldn’t adopt it.

fi_financial_distress.label: Financial distress masked as failed impl
fi_financial_distress.description: Customer was running out of money during implementation; payments failing.

feat_3d_designer.label: 3D Designer reliability / accuracy
feat_3d_designer.description: 3D designer rendering accuracy, custom moldings, complex shapes, broken outputs.

feat_export_integration.label: Cabinet Vision / Microvellum / 2020 export
feat_export_integration.description: Customer needed export to a downstream design/MRP tool that Allmoxy couldn’t produce cleanly.

feat_inventory_erp.label: Inventory / ERP / barcoding
feat_inventory_erp.description: Customer expected ERP-grade features (inventory tracking, barcoding, production capacity) that Allmoxy isn’t built for.

feat_reports.label: Reporting depth missing
feat_reports.description: Customer cited insufficient reports as the gap.

feat_dynamic_attributes_validations.label: Dynamic attributes / validation rigidity
feat_dynamic_attributes_validations.description: Attribute model / validation system too rigid for the customer’s catalog complexity.

feat_b2b.label: B2B features missing
feat_b2b.description: B2B-specific gaps: order-level settings, multi-currency, dealer flows.

feat_pricing_formula_bugs.label: Pricing-formula / catalog accuracy bugs
feat_pricing_formula_bugs.description: Customer launched but the catalog priced wrong / cut-list calculations were inaccurate.

feat_api_integration.label: API / custom integration gap
feat_api_integration.description: Customer wanted API or custom integration that wasn’t available or wasn’t prioritized.

feat_accounting_part_numbers.label: Part numbers / QuickBooks fields missing
feat_accounting_part_numbers.description: Customer needed line-item part numbers or QuickBooks-tracking fields the system didn’t produce.

feat_business_model_mismatch.label: Wrong-shape product for their business
feat_business_model_mismatch.description: Customer’s product type (granite, project-based, etc.) wasn’t well-served by Allmoxy.

feat_competitor_better_fit.label: Competitor cited as better fit
feat_competitor_better_fit.description: Customer named a specific competitor that fit their needs better.

feat_unspecified.label: (Reason not given / vague)
feat_unspecified.description: Tagged Features Missing in HubSpot or by CS, but no specific feature named.

manual_overrides_applied.added_by: Beau Lewis (via Claude evidence review of 31 untagged Failed Implementation customers)
